design_philosophy: Modern, reassuring, warm, feminine-yet-professional. Emphasizes patient-centered, accessible UI/UX with calm visuals, frictionless navigation (large touch targets for one-handed operation), and high cultural relevance.

surfaces_and_shadows.header_nav: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E6E2D8] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_shadows.bottom_tab_bar: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E6E2D8] fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 pb-safe

components.button_primary: bg-[#C85A40] text-white hover:bg-[#A64A35] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center min-h-[48px]
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F8EBE8] text-[#C85A40] hover:bg-[#F0D8D1] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center min-h-[48px]
components.input_field: w-full bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#E6E2D8] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-[#2D332F] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8DA399] min-h-[48px]
components.card_metric: bg-white p-5 rounded-3xl border border-black/5 flex flex-col gap-2
components.badge_status: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-[#EAF0ED] text-[#3E5249]

images.description: Smiling pregnant African woman, use for onboarding or maternal dashboard hero background with light overlay.
African mother and baby in vibrant clothing, use for 'Carnet Enfants' section header.
Cheerful African doctor, use for Telemedicine / 'Rendez-vous' section or professional onboarding.

Dashboard_Maman.layout: Mobile-first vertical stack with bottom tab navigation.
sections: Hero Card: Pregnancy Week tracker or Current Cycle Status. Uses primary color bg with white text.
Quick Actions: 3-4 circular buttons (Rendez-vous, IA Assistant, Carnet, Urgence) horizontally scrollable.
Today's Reminders: Vertical list of tasks (e.g., 'Prendre vitamines').
Community Highlights: Horizontal scroll of recent forum posts.
Header: Title 'Assistant À lo Maman', back button.
Chat Area: Scrollable list of message bubbles.
Input Area: Sticky bottom, large text input with send icon button. Respects safe area insets.
Child Selector: Horizontal tabs to switch between children.
Vaccine Schedule: Timeline component showing upcoming and completed vaccines.
Metrics Row: Total patients, today's appointments.
Patient List: Searchable table/list of assigned patients.

accessibility_and_motion.animations: Subtle scale on tap (active:scale-95), smooth transitions for page routing.
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure text over images has dark gradient overlay. Buttons must have 4.5:1 contrast.
accessibility_and_motion.touch_targets: All clickable elements must be at least 48x48px.
accessibility_and_motion.test_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React JS and Tailwind CSS, simulating a mobile app layout (max-width container like max-w-md mx-auto for desktop viewing, full width on mobile).
Use standard HTML tags (div, section, span) with Tailwind for complex custom layouts, and Shadcn primitives for complex interactions (Dialog, Tabs, Select).
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image services. Use the exact media URLs provided in this JSON.
Implement bottom tab navigation for the main app sections.
Use the exact color hex codes provided. Tint all greys slightly with the primary/secondary hue.
All buttons and clickable areas must follow the touch target rules (min-h-[48px]).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
